personal_info.name: Dina Maher
personal_info.title: Flutter Developer | Cross-Platform Mobile Applications
personal_info.about_me: A Flutter Developer with +1 years of experience building high-performance cross-platform mobile applications. Proficient in state management, Firebase integration, and applying clean architecture principles. Committed to delivering intuitive user experiences and collaborating effectively to achieve project goals.

technical_skills: RESTful APIs, Firebase, Supabase, Hive and SQLite
OOP, SOLID Principles and Design Patterns

experience.title: Freelance Flutter Developer
description_points: Worked as a freelance Flutter developer on a ride-hailing mobile application similar to inDriver.
Contributed to core features including Google Maps integration, dynamic pricing logic, and payment workflows.
Collaborated remotely with the team to develop and maintain both passenger and driver applications.
Built scalable and reusable UI components following clean architecture principles.
Improved app performance and user experience through bug fixing and optimization.

projects.name: InDriver
projects.short_description: Driver-side mobile application for accepting and managing freelance delivery tasks.
projects.description: A Flutter-based driver application designed for freelancers to receive, accept, and manage delivery or service requests in real time. The app includes live order tracking, earnings overview, and status management with a clean and responsive UI.

projects.name: Skin Scan
projects.short_description: AI-powered wound and skin disease detection app.
projects.description: An AI-powered Flutter application for wound and skin disease detection using camera input and external AI models. The app provides instant diagnosis and guidance through REST API integration.

projects.name: Market E-commerce
projects.short_description: Flutter e-commerce app with authentication, cart, and REST APIs.
projects.description: A Flutter-based e-commerce application featuring authentication, product listing, cart management, and real-time REST API integration following clean architecture principles.

projects.name: Bookly
projects.short_description: Book browsing app using Google Books API.
projects.description: A Flutter book browsing application built with MVVM architecture and Cubit state management. Integrated Google Books API using Dio with robust error handling.

projects.name: Upper-UI
projects.short_description: Modern financial dashboard UI built with Flutter.
projects.description: A modern Flutter UI project for financial market tracking, featuring dashboards, charts, watchlists, authentication screens, and Light/Dark mode support.

projects.name: Delivery App
projects.short_description: Delivery app with real-time tracking and online payments.
projects.description: A Flutter delivery application with real-time location tracking, distance-based pricing, and Stripe/PayPal payment integration.
